rules.name: no-hardcoded-colors
rules.evidence: Tailwind only, semantic tokens (`bg-muted`, `text-foreground-light`), no hardcoded colors.

rules.name: prefer-shortcut-registry
rules.evidence: Prefer registered, discoverable shortcuts over one-off keyboard listeners; keep `G then ...` chords for navigation.

uncompilable: Use U.S. English everywhere — general language/spelling convention, not tied to a specific checkable action pattern.
Import shared UI components from the 'ui' package rather than underlying libraries directly — no enumerated forbidden import paths to bind a regex to.
Use `_Shadcn_`-suffixed variants for form primitives — naming convention without an enumerable component list to detect violations against.
See studio-* skills for detailed studio conventions — a pointer to other skills, not itself an actionable rule.
